# `discoverConfig`

Generated reference page for the `discoverConfig` function export.

- Import: `dreamcli`
- Export kind: function
- Declared in: `src/core/config/index.ts`
- Source link: [`src/core/config/index.ts:288`](https://github.com/kjanat/dreamcli/blob/master/src/core/config/index.ts#L288)

## Signatures

```ts
function discoverConfig(
  appName: string,
  adapter: ConfigAdapter,
  options?: ConfigDiscoveryOptions,
): Promise<ConfigDiscoveryResult>;
```

## Examples

```ts
const result = await discoverConfig('mycli', adapter, {
  loaders: [
    configFormat(['yaml', 'yml'], Bun.YAML.parse),
    configFormat(['toml'], Bun.TOML.parse),
  ],
});
```
